title: RoleResponsibilities
description: JSON Schema for CXO role-responsibility JSON-LD files. Each file declares the committed responsibilities of one CXO across one dimension (Entrepreneur | Manager | DomainExpert), authored through Werner Erhard's ontological frame of responsibility-as-authorship.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URI. Must resolve to the canonical responsibilities context.

@id.description: Canonical IRI for this responsibility document. Pattern: agent:{agent_id}/responsibilities/{dimension_slug}

dimension.description: The responsibility dimension this document covers.

dimension_frame.description: Narrative description of the dimension frame — what authorship means in this dimension for this role.

erhard_principle.description: A first-person, role/dimension-specific declaration of unconditional ownership authored through Werner Erhard's ontological frame.

responsibilities.description: Ordered list of committed responsibilities for this role/dimension pair.

Responsibility.title: Responsibility
Responsibility.description: A single committed responsibility, expressed as committed authorship rather than obligation.

title.description: Short, noun-phrase title for this responsibility (3–10 words).

commitment.description: First-person declaration of committed authorship. Must begin with "I am the committed source of".

scope.description: The domain, boundaries, and key dimensions this responsibility covers.

accountability.description: Concrete, observable deliverable or metric that proves this responsibility is being honoured.

planner_task_id.description: Microsoft Planner task ID once this responsibility has been synced to a Planner plan. Populated by the planner sync workflow.
